'use strict'; var Type = require('../type'); var _hasOwnProperty = Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty; function resolveYamlSet(data) { if (data === null) return true; var key, object = data; for (key in object) { if (_hasOwnProperty.call(object, key)) { if (object[key] !== null) return false; } } return true; } function constructYamlSet(data) { return data !== null ? data : {}; } module.exports = new Type('tag:yaml.org,2002:set', { kind: 'mapping', resolve: resolveYamlSet, construct: constructYamlSet });
